posts.content: 沛国谯县人。少机警，任侠放荡，而好学多谋。
posts.translation: From Qiao in Pei: sharp as a youth, unruly and fond of knightly ways—but hungry to learn and scheme.

posts.content: 官渡之后，河北渐次平定，挟天子以令诸侯之势愈固。
posts.translation: After Guandu the north was slowly pacified; holding the emperor to command the lords grew firmer.

posts.content: 进魏王。立法度，抑豪强，惟才是举，不问出身。
posts.translation: Raised King of Wei: laws, curbing great houses, promoting talent without asking pedigree.

posts.content: 卒于洛阳。乱世奸雄之名任人说，功业与诗文自存。
posts.translation: Died in Luoyang. Call me villain if you will—work and verse remain.
